Package com.teamMatcha.pos

Class BackendController

java.lang.Object
com.teamMatcha.pos.BackendController
public class BackendController extends Object
Acts as the bridge between the UI and the Database. Handles various business logic tasks for the cashier and manager views.

  • Constructor Details

    • BackendController

      public BackendController()

  • Method Details

    • getMenu

      public static List<Product> getMenu()
      Retrieves the full menu from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all products in the menu.

    • calculateCartTotal

      public static double calculateCartTotal(List<CartItem> cartItems)
      Calculates the total price of items in the cart.
      Parameters:
      cartItems - The list of items in the cart.
      Returns:
      The total cost of all items in the cart.

    • handlePlaceOrder

      public static boolean handlePlaceOrder(String customerName, int employeeID, List<CartItem> cartItems)
      Logic for the "Place Order" button. Validates inventory and submits the order to the database.
      Parameters:
      customerName - The name of the customer placing the order.
      employeeID - The ID of the employee processing the order.
      cartItems - The list of items being ordered.
      Returns:
      true if the order was successfully placed, false otherwise.

    • validateEmployeeInput

      public static boolean validateEmployeeInput(String name, String role, String pay, String hrs)
      Validates employee input from the Add/Edit Employee Dialog.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the employee.
      role - The job role of the employee.
      pay - The pay rate as a string.
      hrs - The hours (currently unused but validated).
      Returns:
      true if all inputs are valid, false otherwise.

    • handleAddEmployee

      public static void handleAddEmployee(String name, String role, String pay)
      Handles adding a new employee to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the new employee.
      role - The job role of the new employee.
      pay - The pay rate of the new employee as a string.

    • handleUpdateEmployee

      public static void handleUpdateEmployee(int id, String name, String role, String pay)
      Handles updating an existing employee's information.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of the employee to update.
      name - The updated name of the employee.
      role - The updated job role of the employee.
      pay - The updated pay rate of the employee as a string.

    • handleRemoveEmployee

      public static void handleRemoveEmployee(int id)
      Handles removing an employee from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of the employee to remove.

    • handleRestock

      public static void handleRestock(String itemName)
      Logic for the "Restock" button interaction.
      Parameters:
      itemName - The name of the inventory item to restock.

    • getXReports

      public static List<XReports> getXReports(LocalDate date)
      Retrieves X-Reports for a specific date from the database.
      Parameters:
      date - The date for which to retrieve reports.
      Returns:
      A list of X-Reports for the given date.

    • getZReport

      public static Database.ZReportData getZReport()
      Retrieves the Z-Report data.
      Returns:
      The Z-Report data.

    • clearOrdersToday

      public static void clearOrdersToday()
      Clears the daily order summary.

    • hasZReportRun

      public static boolean hasZReportRun()
      Checks if the Z-Report has already been run today.
      Returns:
      true if the Z-Report has run, false otherwise.

    • setMenuIngredients

      public static void setMenuIngredients(int menuID, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Updates the ingredients for a specific menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuID - The ID of the menu item.
      ingredients - A map of inventory IDs to their required quantities.
